title: cyatheaceae
intro: The Cyatheaceae rank refers to a family of plants, specifically a group of ferns that belong to the division Pteridophyta. This family is commonly known as the tree ferns, characterized by their tall, woody stalks and broad, flat fronds. Cyatheaceae comprises around 45 to 50 species found in tropical and subtropical regions, often near water sources. These plants are typically shade-loving and can grow up to several meters tall, with some species even forming small forests in their native habitats.
